---
title: "fdr"
generated: true
description: "Unified false-discovery-rate correction dispatcher."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.inference.multiple_comparisons`](../nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:fdr -->
```python
fdr(p_values: Float[Array, 'n'], *, method: FDRMethod = 'bh', alpha: float = 0.05, lam: float = 0.5) -> Tuple[Bool[Array, 'n'], Float[Array, 'n']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:fdr -->
Unified false-discovery-rate correction dispatcher.

Dispatches to one of the false-discovery-rate procedures according to
`method`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:fdr -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `p_values` | `Float` | `n` | — | Flat vector of `n` per-element p-values. |
| `method` | `FDRMethod` | — | `'bh'` | The correction procedure: `'bh'` (default, Benjamini-Hochberg via [`fdr_bh`](../nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons/fdr_bh.qmd), valid under independence or positive regression dependence), `'by'` (Benjamini-Yekutieli via [`fdr_by`](../nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons/fdr_by.qmd), valid under arbitrary dependence), or `'storey'` ($\pi_0$-adaptive via [`fdr_storey`](../nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons/fdr_storey.qmd), higher power). |
| `alpha` | `float` | — | `0.05` | Target false-discovery rate defining the rejection mask. Default `0.05`. |
| `lam` | `float` | — | `0.5` | Tuning parameter $\lambda \in (0, 1)$ for the $\pi_0$ estimate; used only when `method='storey'`. Default `0.5`. |

**Returns** `Tuple[Bool[Array, 'n'], Float[Array, 'n']]`. The rejection mask `p_adjusted <= alpha`. The adjusted p-values (q-values) of the selected procedure.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:fdr -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
